data.title: FTAI Aviation buys 7 Airbus aircraft from Air France to focus on end-of-life fleet strategy.
data.description: The recent acquisition includes the purchase of seven modern Airbus aircraft.

data.title: InterDigital renews patent license agreement with Sony on Feb 17, 2026. Stock Nasdaq: IDCC.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, a company known for its wireless, video, and AI technology research and development, InterDigital, Inc. (Nasdaq: IDCC), revealed that they have entered into a fresh patent license deal with Sony.

data.title: Kennedy Wilson to be acquired by consortium led by William McMorrow and Fairfax Financial in all-cash transaction.
data.description: Kennedy-Wilson Holdings, Inc. and Fairfax Financial Holdings Limited have revealed in a joint announcement that Kennedy Wilson is set to be acquired in an all-cash deal. The agreement, known as the Merger Agreement, involves an entity affiliated with a consortium led by William McMorrow, who serves as the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Kennedy Wilson. The consortium includes other senior executives of the company, along with Fairfax. The acquisition news was disclosed on February 17, 2026, with the deal involving entities trading under the tickers TSX: FFH and FFH.U.

data.title: Herc Holdings beat Q4 earnings estimates by 11.29% with EPS of $2.07 (vs $1.86 est.) Revenue up $258M YoY.
data.description: Herc Holdings (NYSE: HRI) released its fourth-quarter earnings on Tuesday, February 17, 2026, at 06:30 AM. The earnings report revealed that the company surpassed expected earnings by 11.29%, with an EPS of $2.07 compared to the estimated $1.86. Additionally, revenue showed an increase of $258.00 million compared to the previous year's same period. In the previous quarter, Herc Holdings also outperformed in terms of EPS. For more details, the full story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TPG Mortgage Investment Q4 earnings report: EPS $0.25 (missed estimate by 0.0%), revenue up $3.61M from last year.
data.description: On Tuesday, February 17, 2026 at 06:30 AM, TPG Mortgage Investment (NYSE: MITT) released its Q4 earnings report. The company fell short of estimated earnings by 0.0%, reporting an EPS of $0.25 compared to the estimated $0.25. Revenue showed an increase of $3.61 million from the previous year. In terms of past performance, TPG Mortgage Investment had exceeded EPS expectations. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trilogy Metals reports strong fiscal year-end results for 2025 with $51.6 million cash balance and $17.8 million US federal investment in Upper Kobuk Mineral Projects to support critical minerals production in Alaska. Strategic partnerships in place for project advancement with a $35 million budget approved for 2026. U.S. government committed to facilitating financing for Ambler Access Project as part of the joint venture with South32 Limited. Landmark year for the company strengthening financial position and leadership for targeted project execution.
data.description: Trilogy Metals Inc. reported its financial results for the year ending November 30, 2025, emphasizing a strong cash balance of $51.6 million and a $17.8 million strategic investment commitment from the U.S. federal government. The company approved a $35 million budget for the Ambler Metals joint venture to advance the Arctic deposit towards production. The U.S. also committed to facilitating financing for the construction of the Ambler Road, linking the UKMP to the Dalton Highway. Plans include opening the Bornite camp for exploration drilling. The company aims to secure domestic supplies of critical minerals and advance the UKMP in partnership with key stakeholders. Wildlife management expenses in 2025 rose to $3,450,000.

data.title: Enlight Renewable Energy Q4 earnings beat estimates by 225%, with EPS of $0.1 vs. $-0.08 estimate. Revenue up $48.26 million.
data.description: Enlight Renewable Energy (NASDAQ: ENLT) published its Q4 financial results on Tuesday, February 17, 2026 at 06:15 AM. In the report, Enlight Renewable Energy exceeded anticipated earnings by a significant 225.0%, posting an EPS of $0.1 compared to the estimated $-0.08. Revenue also saw an impressive increase of $48.26 million from the previous year. This positive performance builds upon earlier successes, as the company had previously surpassed EPS expectations... For more details, the complete article can be accessed on the website Benzinga.com.
